# STAGE 1: PROJECT INITIALIZATION & STAKEHOLDER MAPPING

**Project Name:** Document Management Modernisation
**Industry:** Manufacturing
**Date:** 2025-06-15

---

## Executive Summary

This stage defines the project scope and stakeholders. The goal is to improve document processing
and achieve compliance. Several stakeholders have been identified and the project driver is
cost reduction and efficiency improvement.

---

## Project Scope — In Scope

Various document types are included in scope for this project, such as supplier invoices,
customer invoices, purchase orders, and delivery notes. These documents currently require
manual handling which is time-consuming.

---

## Project Scope — Out of Scope

HR documents and technical drawings are out of scope for this phase.

---

## System Landscape

The company uses an ERP system and accounting software. Integration will be required
with existing systems.

---

## Stakeholder Register

| ID | Name | Role | Department | Interest | Influence |
|----|------|------|------------|----------|-----------|
| SH-001 | Anna Kowalska | CFO | Finance | HIGH | HIGH |
| SH-002 | Marek Nowak | IT Manager | IT | HIGH | HIGH |

---

## RACI Matrix

| Activity | CFO | IT Manager | Finance Manager |
|----------|-----|------------|-----------------|
| Define Scope | C | C | R |
| Approve Budget | A | I | C |

---

## Success Criteria — Quantitative KPIs

The invoice processing time should be reduced significantly. The approval cycle should
become much faster. Error rates should be lowered. Cost savings are expected to be
substantial. The team believes these improvements are achievable.

<!-- Note: deliberately no numeric values above — testing SMART check -->

---

## Success Criteria — ROI Targets

The project is expected to pay back within a reasonable timeframe. NPV should be
positive. IRR is expected to be acceptable.

---

## Regulatory Requirements

GDPR applies to this project. E-invoicing mandates must be considered.
Financial reporting requirements are also relevant.

---

## Communication Plan

Regular meetings will be held with stakeholders. Email updates will be sent.
The team will use Slack for day-to-day communication.

---

## Project Constraints

The budget is limited. The timeline is tight. Resources are constrained.

---

## Assumptions & Dependencies

1. API access will be available
2. Stakeholders will be engaged throughout

---
